verse.name: v1
verse.lines: This is the Ephesians We're at the end of the age God has made known to us The mystery of His will; We were chosen and predestinated For such a Time like this We are coming out of And we are going in

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: To (On) the other side, I will be there; Once a stranger without fellowship, Now in Christ I have citizenship. To the other side, will you be there, Who was dead in sins and trespasses, There's a body waiting for you On the other side.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We are living in the Promise for this day Back to our origin, God has made a way; The Bride is the Final Voice, And She has turned at the West, Our victory is sure, We have an open door.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When thou passeth through rough waters, I will be with Thee, And thou walkest through the fire, It shall not hurt Thee. For I Am the Lord thy God, And thou art precious in My sight You shall have no other God but Me, Because I have no other Wife but Thee

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: This is the Stars' Wars We stand with Pleiades and Orion. Look to the unseen For our battle is not carnal. Mt. Zion, mix the Word with Faith. The Lion roars, and the nations shake.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: The Bride is dwelling, under the Palm Tree. In the Ephesians All things are under Her feet. Seeds of Abraham Under preparation, For the rapture, between six and nine.
